section.title: Textbook
section.p: Linear Algebra and its Applications, 6th edition, Lay, Lay, and McDonald.

PCC has an agreement with the publisher of this textbook where you were charged a course fee when you registered for the course. And that fee pays for your digital access to the book. So you can already access the e-book from our D2L course, using the RedShelf link.

You can opt out of this fee using that same RedShelf link. You must do this by the second Monday of the term. You will be refunded the fee around the fourth week of the term. You should only opt out if you have access to the book some other way, like a print copy.

For our section of MTH 261, if you have an earlier edition of this textbook, that should not be a problem. This is true for the 5th edition. Please check with me if you have something earlier and I will review it.
